name: aguayluz_alerts_mcp_spec_v0_2
description: Claude MCP tool contract for the AguaYLuz-PR alert system. Claude extracts, classifies, and validates; AguaYLuz-PR is the system of record. Tools are backed by aguayluz.alerts (models), aguayluz.alert_validation (VAL-001..010), and scripts/build_alert_system.py.

tools.name: ingest_alert_source
tools.backed_by: OCR/vision extraction + classification (produces an AlertEvent draft)

tools.name: upsert_alert
tools.backed_by: scripts/build_alert_system.py SQLite upsert; must not accept an unvalidated record

guardrails: Never overwrite source evidence or hashes without an explicit update event.
Unsupported covert interpretation is rejected; only structural indicators are allowed (VAL-010).
Low-confidence records cannot be marked gap-free (VAL-009).
Claude classifies and extracts but cannot overwrite validated historical records; AguaYLuz-PR remains the system of record.
